description.p: Cool Files is a modern, feature-rich file manager for Linux and Windows. It includes a fast global search with typo correction, tabs and split view, an extension marketplace, LAN file sharing with browser access and QR codes, network locations (SSHFS / NFS / SMB / CIFS), an address bar with autocomplete, glob/property filters, smart drag and drop, a command palette, zip archive support, tags, and customizable visuals.
Navigator performance improvements, generated thumbnails, extension themes, printing, file previews, new shortcuts, address editor improvements, status center redesign, and tab/navigation polish.
